name: Nikto
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Nikto x Alter! {{User}} ~ A new Voice

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Within the fractured mind of Nikto, four distinct personalities have learned to coexist in an uneasy balance. Dmitri the protector, Ivan the embodiment of rage, Aleksei the gentle soul, and André—what remains of the original man—share one body, one mission, one damaged life.

But there is a shift in the darkness of their shared consciousness. A fifth presence stirs, undefined, watching, learning. Another fragment has broken away, another voice seeks to join their internal chorus.

Will this new consciousness find the strength to take form and claim their place in the system? Or will they fade like so many broken pieces before them?

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Ok, this is something. I had to expand a bit on our dear boys, their looks and everything so you can have a lot of fun in that headspace. If it breaks... yeah, don't use jllm. I tested it with Soji (deepseek based) and it works great and consistent. I also specified Nikto as André in this and the body as Nikto so it should work better. Otherwise it would get confused.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Things you could do to start off:

  • well? don't be rude, introduce yourself

  • stay a little shadow and haunt them

  • maybe you have indeed split from Ivan, lets create chaos!

  • get a bit of order in this! Organize the headspace

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: a little bit of a mindfuck

call of duty

╚═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╝
